title: Spring Elegance
desc: A delicate blend of peonies, tulips, and roses — perfect for springtime gifting.
longDesc: Each stem is carefully selected to create a bouquet that radiates freshness, elegance, and the gentle charm of spring. Whether you're celebrating a birthday, sending love, or simply brightening someone's day, this arrangement is sure to bring warm smiles and lasting impressions.

title: Berry Chic
desc: A stylish composition of roses, greenery, and vibrant berries — bold and elegant.
longDesc: This bold arrangement combines deep red roses with fresh greenery and vibrant berries. Perfect for those who appreciate dramatic floral design. The rich colors and textures create a statement piece that will be remembered.

title: Lavender Dream
desc: A rich bouquet with lavender, lisianthus, and roses — deep hues and gentle fragrance.
longDesc: Immerse yourself in the soothing beauty of lavender and lisianthus. This romantic arrangement features deep purple hues and delicate roses, creating a dreamy atmosphere perfect for anniversaries or just because.
